rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is entirely unrelated to Elec. Code §257.005, which governs campaign finance reporting for political party chair candidates. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 257.005. CANDIDATE FOR STATE OR COUNTY CHAIR OF POLITICAL PARTY.
_note: Rule text concerns election campaign finance for party chair candidates; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
